compiled_state.title: [test-ticket-init-bash-native]: pre-existing test failure on main branch
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description: tests/scripts/test-ticket-init-bash-native.sh is failing on the main branch (pre-existing, not introduced by recent changes). Confirmed pre-existing via git stash test. Needs investigation to determine root cause and fix.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 4 (INTERMEDIATE). The test test_ensure_initialized_no_python3 fails because ticket_show in ticket-lib-api.sh spawns python3 to call ticket_reducer.reduce_ticket. The bash-native path was implemented for _ensure_initialized but ticket_show still uses python3.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — intent clearly aligned from test file comment: test was written as a TDD RED test expecting bash-native ticket show to not spawn python3
comments.author: Test
